summary: DHH announces he's traveling to Chicago for the second Building of Basecamp workshop. He mentions selling his PowerBook and expecting a new machine from Jason Fried upon arrival. He recommends Carbon Copy Cloner for migrating between Apple machines using an iPod as transfer medium. The post is a brief travel update with minimal substantive content.
key_points: Traveling to Chicago for the second Building of Basecamp workshop
Carbon Copy Cloner enables seamless migration between Apple machines using an iPod as transfer medium
The Basecamp workshops involved talks and debates on the nature of web applications
money_quotes: With CCC, you can create a complete image of your harddrive, place it on an iPod, and load it on the new machine in no time at all.
key_insight: A brief 2004 travel update offering a small window into the early days of Basecamp's community-building workshops and the Apple-centric tooling of the era.
